---
id: get-well-known
title: "Node identity and capabilities"
description: "Returns node identity, auth configuration, federation capabilities, supported namespaces, and a link to the spec. No authentication required. Peers fetch this endpoint during the federation handshake to verify the peer's public key and supported scopes. See spec §5.3."
sidebar_label: "Node identity and capabilities"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Node identity and capabilities"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/.well-known/stigmem"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns node identity, auth configuration, federation capabilities, supported namespaces, and a link to the spec. No authentication required. Peers fetch this endpoint during the federation handshake to verify the peer's public key and supported scopes. See spec §5.3.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-well-known.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./get-well-known.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
